question: Chapters
feedback: The text does not list the main chapters or sections of the thesis (e.g., Literature Review, Methodology, Implementation, Results). It only includes the problem statement and a development plan.

question: Description
feedback: The text does not describe the contents of any thesis sections. While it describes the problem, it fails to provide a summary of what each chapter of the work will entail.

question: Structure
feedback: The general structure of the thesis cannot be understood from this text. The text provides a timeline for administrative milestones (deadlines) rather than the logical structure of the research content.
